name: xilinx-native-debug
description: Xilinx and embedded native debugging for XSDB, GDB, LLDB, Zynq, ZynqMP, Versal, and MicroBlaze in VS Code
author: 1nv4510n

commands.title: Xilinx Native Debug: Examine Memory Location

arguments.description: Arguments to append after the executable. You can also use pipes.

terminal.description: Leave this field undefined to keep program output in the vscode console at the bottom. If this is set to empty string the program will spawn in a new console using x-terminal-emulator on linux, otherwise with the specified terminal. On windows setting this to an empty string spawns the program in a console, but no other console is supported.

gdbpath.description: Path to the gdb executable or the command if in PATH

env.description: Environment overriding the gdb (and in turn also the process) environment

debugger_args.description: Additional arguments to pass to GDB

pathSubstitutions.description: Help GDB find your source using path substitutions (GDB `substitute-path)` variable

valuesFormatting.description: Set the way of showing variable values. 'disabled' - show value as is, 'parseText' - parse debuggers output text into structure, 'prettyPrinters' - enable debuggers custom pretty-printers if there are any

frameFilters.description: Use frame filters registered in GDB

printCalls.description: Prints all GDB calls to the console

showDevDebugOutput.description: Prints all GDB responses to the console

autorun.description: GDB commands to run when starting to debug

stopAtEntry.description: Whether debugger should stop at application entry point

ssh.description: If this is set then the extension will connect to an ssh host and run GDB there

host.description: Remote host name/ip to connect to

password.description: Plain text password (unsafe; if possible use keyfile instead)

useAgent.description: Auto-detect the running SSH agent (via SSH_AUTH_SOCK environment variable) and use it to perform authentication

sourceFileMap.description: Mapping of source paths (from GDB on ssh remote) to local (IDE) paths.

cwd.description:
Working directory for the debugger.
If `ssh.sourceFileMap` is not set, then this is also the project path on the remote for mapping with `cwd`.

forwardX11.description: If true, the server will redirect x11 to the local host

x11port.description: TCP port to redirect X11 data to (by default port = display + 6000); raw display number for unix domain connection

x11host.description: Hostname/ip to redirect X11 data to; empty string for a unix domain connection

remotex11screen.description: Screen to start the application on the remote side

bootstrap.description: Content will be executed on the SSH host before the debugger call.

registerLimit.description: List of numbers specifying the registers to display. An empty string indicates that the contents of all the registers must be returned.

target.description: PID of running program or program name or connection arguments (eg :2345) if remote is true

remote.description: If true this will connect to a gdbserver instead of attaching to a PID

valuesFormatting.description: Set the way of showing variable values. 'disabled' - show value as is, 'parseText' - parse debuggers output text into structure, 'prettyPrinters' - enable debuggers custom pretty-printers if there are any

frameFilters.description: Use frame filters registered in GDB

printCalls.description: Prints all GDB calls to the console

showDevDebugOutput.description: Prints all GDB responses to the console

executable.description: Path of executable for debugging symbols

env.description: Environment overriding the gdb (and in turn also the process) environment

registerLimit.description: List of register numbers to display. Empty string for all.

xsdbPath.description: Path to the xsdb executable (or xsdb.bat on Windows)

hwServerUrl.description: hw_server URL (e.g. TCP:localhost:3121). Leave empty for local auto-connect.

bitstreamPath.description: Path to the .bit / .pdi bitstream file for FPGA programming

ltxPath.description: Optional path to the .ltx probes file for ILA debug

loadhwMemRanges.description: Optional memory ranges for loadhw (each item format: '0xSTART 0xEND')

hwDesignPath.description: Path to the .hdf / .xsa hardware design file

psInitScript.description: Path to the PS init Tcl script (e.g. ps7_init.tcl)

initScript.description: Path to a custom Tcl init script (overrides all preset init steps)

initTargetFilter.description: XSDB init target filter used before loadhw/ps init (e.g. 'APU*')

targetFilter.description: XSDB target name/filter to select (e.g. 'ARM Cortex-A9 #0', 'APU*')

jtagCableName.description: Optional JTAG cable name filter (matches jtag_cable_name)

forceMemAccess.description: Run 'configparams force-mem-access 1' before init and set back to 0 after reset

stopBeforePsInit.description: Run XSDB 'stop' before PS init sequence

keepXsdbAlive.description: Keep XSDB running alongside GDB for runtime memory/register access

boardFamily.description: Xilinx board family for preset init sequence

xsdbAutorun.description: Additional XSDB commands to run after init

registerPreset.description: XSDB register display preset: 'minimal' (GP+SP+PC+CPSR), 'core' (all non-banked), or 'all'

peripheralWatch.description: Custom peripheral/memory addresses to watch. Each entry: { name, address, count?, refreshOnStop? }

breakpointAutoReapply.description: Re-validate GDB breakpoints after XSDB reset/init cycles

freertosAwareness.description: Enable FreeRTOS task detection and display in Variables panel

mapFilePath.description: Path to GNU ld linker .map file for symbol annotation of memory addresses

xsdbTraceCommands.description: Record XSDB command trace with timestamps and latency (view with 'xsdb: trace' in debug console)

crashAnalyzer.description: Enable automatic ARM fault analysis on crash/exception stops (reads DFSR/DFAR/IFSR/IFAR or ESR_ELx/FAR_ELx)

target.description: PID of running program or connection arguments (e.g. :2345) if remote is true

remote.description: If true this will connect to a gdbserver instead of attaching to a PID

configurationSnippets.label: XSDB+GDB: Zynq-7000 Debug PS Application
configurationSnippets.description: Program FPGA, init PS7, then attach GDB for Zynq-7000 application debugging

configurationSnippets.label: XSDB+GDB: Zynq UltraScale+ Debug PS Application
configurationSnippets.description: Program FPGA, init PSU, then attach GDB for Zynq UltraScale+ application debugging

configurationSnippets.label: XSDB+GDB: Program Bitstream Only
configurationSnippets.description: Program FPGA bitstream via XSDB, then launch GDB

configurationSnippets.label: XSDB+GDB: Attach with Custom Init Script
configurationSnippets.description: Run a custom XSDB Tcl init script, then attach GDB

xilinx-debug.serial.defaultBaudRate.description: Default baud rate for the UART serial terminal.

xilinx-debug.serial.defaultPort.description: Default serial port (e.g. COM3 on Windows, /dev/ttyUSB0 on Linux).

xilinx-debug.serial.externalTool.description: External tool to use for serial communication. 'auto' detects the best available tool.

xilinx-debug.tcp.defaultHost.description: Default host for raw TCP terminal connections.

xilinx-debug.tcp.defaultPort.description: Default port for raw TCP terminal connections.

xilinx-debug.hexEditor.defaultByteCount.description: Default number of bytes to read in the Hex Memory Editor.

xilinx-debug.xsdb.defaultResetType.description: Default reset type for the Quick Reset button.

xilinx-debug.xsdb.standalonePath.description: Path to the xsdb executable for standalone (non-debug-session) tools.

xilinx-debug.xsdb.standaloneHwServerUrl.description: hw_server URL for standalone XSDB connections (e.g. tcp:127.0.0.1:3121).
